mistral_few_shot_summary: The customer is a coffee drinker who is not a fan of flavored coffees and rates them as average. They prefer the regular coffees, particularly the Amazonia and Africana medium roasts, and the dark roast Eclipse, Mexican, and French roasts. They make good ice coffee and are strong but not bitter. The customer did not like the Costa Rican light roast, which had an artificial taste. They also tried the house blend, which was good but not exceptional. The customer used a decaf k-cup to water their plants and had no opinion on its taste. They also used the chocolate raspberry flavor in a cake batter and found it delicious. The customer was disappointed with the selection of flavored coffees they received, as several were duplicates of ordinary coffees and two advertised flavors were not included. The product was delivered on time.

Customers, including those from Greece, highly praise this Cretan olive oil for its pure and full taste, making it ideal for cooking, salads, and dressings. They recommend it for improving nutritional habits. Users enjoy using it for various purposes such as salads, dipping bread, hummus, and sautéing veggies and meat. Some customers have met the producer, Nick, and appreciate the personal touch. They find that local products from farmers markets taste better and are worth the extra cost. A bottle lasts a long time. Some customers consider it the best olive oil they have ever tasted due to its excellent blend of flavor and low acidity.

Summary:
Customer 1 praises the new Trident Vitality gum for its strong peppermint flavor, long-lasting taste, and good value. They've tried all three flavors and can't choose a favorite. The gum resembles an old-school chicklet and typically retails for around $1.39 per pack. Customer 1 highly recommends the product.

Customer 2 expresses disappointment with the packaging, which they find too simple. They criticize the lack of ingredient information and the absence of clear product benefits. The taste is described as similar to any other gum.

Customers have purchased this edible glitter to decorate cakes and other treats. The glitter in question is highly recommended for its stunning appearance and ability to make a statement. Several customers have reported fast delivery. However, some customers have expressed concern about the product's advertised edibility, as it tastes like craft glitter. It is recommended to stick with trusted brands for edible glitter, such as Wilton. The glitter has been successfully used to decorate various treats, including a disco ball birthday cake, which received positive feedback from customers.

Customers bought this licorice for their office due to its bite-size pieces, making it easier to snack on. Some received damaged bags in shipping. The Twizzlers brand is preferred over another well-known brand, with black and cherry flavors receiving praise for their good taste. The strawberry flavor was criticized for being too delicate and barely there. Customers appreciate the reasonable price, especially when buying in packs and using Subscribe & Save. The licorice is described as less messy and easier to chew for children. Some customers reported a possible reduction in piece size.

These candies are preferred by some customers, particularly a woman named "my mother-in-law," who has purchased four tubs since Christmas. The candies are described as soft, slightly chewy, and not gummy. The flavors are considered good but not great. They are heavily coated with sugar to enhance their sweetness. Some customers enjoy the high sugar content, while others find them too sweet and will not be ordering again.
